title: Asuka Should We Hate Her
wikitext:
[]: Asuka: Should We Hate Her? Post by TriLink » Mon Sep 24, 2007 10:50 pm Tangent from the Rebuild 2.0 Trailer on YouTube Thread that starts about HERE . Thought it was worth getting into some more. I've always seen Asuka as someone that should be pitied more than hated. Yeah, she's got the whole arrogant bitch thing going for her, but those things are only her way of coping with the god awful life she was given (much in the same way Shinji's acting like a pussy is his way of coping). She went through some horrible things as a child, and I'm amazed that some folks can't cut the poor girl some slack. Her traumatic life obviously doesn't excuse her behavior, but when it comes down to it, she was a mentally ill person who needed help. We shouldn't hate her anymore than we should hate a Bi polar or Schizophrenic person. That's my take, but I'm far more interested in what you, "The People", have to say. Discuss.

[]: Post by chee » Mon Sep 24, 2007 10:52 pm I felt more sorry for her than anything else, even moreso than Shinji.

[]: Post by BobBQ » Mon Sep 24, 2007 10:52 pm One of the best things about NGE, in my opinion, is that none of the characters are so two-dimensional that I can actually hate them. That's a rare thing these days.

[]: Post by Sandoz » Mon Sep 24, 2007 11:18 pm Should we hate her? No, definitely no. She's a traumatized child who doesn't get the help she needs from the people around her. She may not be a particularly nice person, but she doesn't do anything that's truly worthy of hate.

[]: Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Mon Sep 24, 2007 11:20 pm Annoyed, most definitely. Hate, anger, no. That's for Anno-sensei and sometimes Shinji. :mrgreen:

[]: Post by ~at0mic punk~ » Mon Sep 24, 2007 11:39 pm At first Asuka, Kaji, and Misato were the only characters I could relate to, and NO you shouldn't hate Asuka at all

[]: Post by Themaninblack » Mon Sep 24, 2007 11:41 pm Yes She's way worse than Shinji..there I said it

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Sep 25, 2007 1:25 am Asuka was the character I felt most sympathy for -- there is a lot of her that I was or could so easily have been at that age.

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Sep 25, 2007 1:30 am Having a relative soooo much like her I can't help but despise her. Some say she didn't get the help she need but the truth is she rejected it outright.

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Sep 25, 2007 1:30 am Hate? No, her past is as black as Shinji's, if not blacker. As incredibly painful as Shinji's past was, Asuka's past is so, so depressing (The muted tones add to it) it's no wonder she's like this at all. Poor, poor Asuka.

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Sep 25, 2007 1:32 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Some say she didn't get the help she need but the truth is she rejected it outright.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Sep 25, 2007 1:47 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Some say she didn't get the help she need but the truth is she rejected it outright.

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Sep 25, 2007 1:49 am If anyone could understand her it was Shinji the problem is he never tried. However, I was referring to how she basicly told off Langley and the Doctor when she was still a little kid.

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Sep 25, 2007 1:59 am Looks like Tines got it after all. But Asuka did complicate things in the sense that she wanted help badly but couldn't accept any at all. It's that dilemma that makes it complicated for most ordinary people to help her. That way, she's worse off than Shinji.

[]: Post by Ornette » Tue Sep 25, 2007 2:33 am UrsusArctos wrote: Looks like Tines got it after all. But Asuka did complicate things in the sense that she wanted help badly but couldn't accept any at all. It's that dilemma that makes it complicated for most ordinary people to help her. That way, she's worse off than Shinji.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Sep 25, 2007 3:46 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: If anyone could understand her it was Shinji

[]: Post by shinesman_cobalt » Tue Sep 25, 2007 3:51 am I don't hate Asuka, but I become annoyed with her far more often than with other characters. Perhaps it's because she is a girl, and posseses a lot of the negative (as I see them) traits I dont like in girls, such as narsisism and self-centeredness. it's my problem, I'll deal with it. XD

[]: Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Sep 25, 2007 5:19 am How can i hate Asuka when she is my favorite character? :P Asuka's child years have been awful. It's more than rational that they had a big impact on her and in some aspects of her character. Yeah she treats like bitch sometimes--especially to that poor Shinji[i wonder why? :P ]--, she acts like she owns everything but deep down that's a self-defense. A way to fool the others and not show her own weaknesses. #22 explains a lot i think.

[]: Post by machinamar » Tue Sep 25, 2007 5:26 am I actually do like Asuka. Sure, her outward demeanor can be a bit frustrating at first, but: a) like people said, her past is blacker than most of the cast, if not all. b) she's 14 years old. It's her way of coping, and I understand that well; I'm sure some of the people on this board can relate to Asuka -- hiding down their real feelings and desires under a more attractive facade. Everyone has a different way of dealing with life, and I find Asuka's to be one of the more realistic strategies. (Which is probably why I'm so fascinated by the mind-rape scene.) Also, one shouldn't denigrate a person that rejects help. As UrsusArctos said, it's almost always the worst case.

[]: Post by DatDude » Tue Sep 25, 2007 6:56 am I hated her before the mind rape ep then she just made so much sence. poor kid
